seo.title: Healthcare Assistant Jobs in London | Vigil Care Staffing
seo.description: Healthcare assistant jobs with flexibility, purpose, and growth potential. Apply for HCA, support worker, and care roles across London care homes and residential care settings.

nap.address: Ferguson House, 113 Cranbrook Road, Ilford IG1 4PU

fields.heading: Healthcare Assistant Jobs in London
fields.sub: Flexible healthcare assistant and support worker assignments across Greater London, with honest support, proper vetting and your working rights protected.
fields.cta_label: Apply to Join Vigil Care Staffing

image.alt: Healthcare Assistant Jobs in a care home setting

fields.image_alt: Healthcare Assistant Jobs in a care home setting

fields.heading: Explore rewarding care careers
fields.body: Vigil Care Staffing places vetted care-sector workers into care homes, supported living services and other care settings across Greater London. If you enjoy hands-on care work and want assignments that fit around your life, we would like to hear from you. We are honest about what each role involves, and we take the time to match you to work that suits your skills and availability. As a directly employed member of our team, your rights under the Agency Workers Regulations 2010 are protected, and DBS support is available where you need it.

fields.heading: Roles we recruit for

items.title: Healthcare Assistants
items.body: Support residents and service users with daily living, personal care and companionship in care homes and supported living settings.

items.title: Support Workers
items.body: Help people with learning disabilities, mental health needs or complex conditions to live as independently as possible.

items.title: Night-Shift Care Staff
items.body: Provide attentive overnight cover, keeping residents safe and settled while day teams rest.

items.title: Healthcare Cleaners
items.body: Keep care environments clean and hygienic to recognised infection-prevention standards across care settings.

image.alt: Health and social care recruitment agency supporting individuals with complex needs

fields.image_alt: Health and social care recruitment agency supporting individuals with complex needs

items.title: Submit your CV
items.body: Send us your CV and tell us about the care work you enjoy and the areas of Greater London you can travel to.

items.title: Screening and interview
items.body: We talk through your experience, values and availability so we understand the assignments that will suit you best.

items.title: Compliance and training
items.body: We complete DBS checks, right-to-work verification and reference checks, and confirm your mandatory training is up to date.

items.title: Start your first shift
items.body: Once you are cleared, we match you to suitable assignments and brief you fully before your first shift.

items.q: Do I need previous experience to apply?
items.a: Experience in care is helpful, but we welcome applications from people at different stages of their care career. We will discuss your background during screening and match you to suitable assignments.
We place care-sector workers across Greater London. During your application we will confirm the boroughs and settings you can travel to.

items.q: Will you help with my DBS check?
items.a: Yes. DBS support is available as part of our onboarding process, and we guide you through the checks and paperwork you need before your first shift.

items.q: Are the assignments temporary or permanent?
items.a: We offer flexible care-sector assignments, including short-notice rota-gap cover and longer placements. We will match you to work that fits your availability.

fields.heading: Ready to start your next care assignment?
fields.sub: Tell us about yourself and the work you are looking for, and our team will be in touch.
fields.cta_label: Apply to Join Vigil Care Staffing
